target: ACL27 supplement page 3 evidence-gate registry companion v3
reason_independent_review_not_used: Subagent spawning is restricted to explicit user requests in this environment; review followed the render-visual-reviewer checklist locally.

measurement.layout_guard_active_definition: RGB pixels where max(channel)-min(channel) > 15 or mean(channel) < 238, matching tests/test_paper_layout.py figure-density checks.
measurement.page_active245_definition: RGB pixels where max(channel)-min(channel) > 15 or mean(channel) < 245, matching the sparse-page density audit.
measurement.red_pixel_fraction_definition: RGB pixels where R > 150, G < 90, and B < 90.

layout_iterations.result: Accepted: supplement stayed at 45 pages and page 3 active245 increased over the round27 sparse-page audit.

visual_review.standalone_figure: PASS: the v3 companion uses a denser reader-gate AI slot and a taller registered cross-evidence render strip while keeping the four evidence-gate cards readable.
visual_review.pdf_page_03: PASS: the table remains readable, the companion becomes the visual center of the page, and the caption stays separated without clipping.
visual_review.neighbor_pages: PASS: page 2 remains the visual evidence roadmap and page 4 remains the overview claim-boundary page; no float displacement or page-count spill was observed in the 45-page build.
visual_review.claim_boundary: PASS: the caption states that the v3 AI-generated reader-gate schematic is only for exposition and is not a new experiment, metric, VLM run, or navigation run.
